description: Canonical Founder OS roadmap registry. Single source of truth for P14–P20 and S6–S12. This file is deployment-durable — it survives execution_memory TTL resets and Vercel deployments.

roadmap.title: Autonomous Executor
roadmap.objective: Create the first true autonomous execution loop.
roadmap.target_state: Queue → Executor → Execute Route → Evidence → Analysis → Learning

roadmap.title: Execution Workers
roadmap.objective: Introduce worker processes that consume queue leases and perform execution safely. Capabilities: worker ownership, worker heartbeats, lease recovery, crash recovery, worker monitoring.
roadmap.target_state: Workers consuming leased queue items with heartbeat and crash recovery

roadmap.title: Durable Queue Infrastructure
roadmap.objective: Replace execution_memory queue storage with durable queue infrastructure. Capabilities: transactional enqueue, acknowledgements, locking, recovery, dead-letter management.
roadmap.target_state: operations → queue → leases → dead_letter in durable storage

roadmap.title: Semantic Governance
roadmap.objective: Replace keyword governance with semantic classification. Capabilities: LLM-assisted classification, cached governance decisions, semantic policy matching, policy confidence scoring.
roadmap.target_state: LLM-powered governance with confidence scoring replacing keyword matching

roadmap.title: Verified Execution
roadmap.objective: Allow founders to trust execution outcomes. Capabilities: execution receipts, gateway verification, evidence validation, execution confidence scoring.
roadmap.target_state: Every execution produces a verifiable receipt with confidence score

roadmap.title: Cryptographic Audit Chain
roadmap.objective: Create tamper-resistant audit records. Capabilities: signed evidence, chained hashes, replay verification, audit proofs.
roadmap.target_state: Every execution event signed and chained for tamper-proof audit

roadmap.title: Controlled Write Operations
roadmap.objective: Enable safe real-world actions: GitHub writes, Supabase writes, Vercel changes, Doppler changes. Protected by Governance → Authority → Activation → Break Glass → Rollback.
roadmap.target_state: Governed write operations to all external systems with rollback protection

roadmap.title: Rollback & Recovery Framework
roadmap.objective: Ensure every write action is reversible. Capabilities: rollback plans, compensating actions, failure recovery, rollback execution.
roadmap.target_state: Every write action ships with a rollback plan and compensating action

roadmap.title: Multi-Agent Coordination
roadmap.objective: Allow specialized agents to collaborate: Planner Agent, Executor Agent, Reviewer Agent, Governance Agent, Learning Agent.
roadmap.target_state: Five specialized agents coordinating on every operation

roadmap.title: Resource & Budget Control
roadmap.objective: Prevent runaway spending and execution. Capabilities: execution budgets, model budgets, daily limits, approval thresholds.
roadmap.target_state: Every execution subject to budget and limit enforcement

roadmap.title: Autonomous Department Operations
roadmap.objective: Operate departments autonomously: Engineering, Product, Growth, Marketing, Operations, Support.
roadmap.target_state: Each department has an autonomous agent executing department-level operations

roadmap.title: Compliance & Risk Layer
roadmap.objective: Provide enterprise-grade governance. Capabilities: audit retention, compliance policies, evidence retention, risk controls.
roadmap.target_state: Full audit retention and compliance policy enforcement across all operations

roadmap.title: Cross-Business Coordination
roadmap.objective: Allow one Founder OS to operate multiple businesses simultaneously: Pranix, SchoolOS, Cart2Save, Future Ventures.
roadmap.target_state: Single Founder OS managing multiple business entities in parallel

roadmap.title: Business Autopilot
roadmap.objective: Create a business operating system capable of autonomous operation under governance. Founder Role: Strategic Oversight. System Role: Operational Execution.
roadmap.target_state: Observe → Recommend → Govern → Authorize → Execute → Learn → Optimize
roadmap.notes: The culmination of all Founder OS phases. Founder retains strategic oversight; system handles operational execution autonomously.
